title: Prism Marks
description: Mark type and mark properties for a Prism spec.

mark_type.description: One of the supported Prism mark types.

oneOf.description: Shorthand: a bare mark type string.

mark.description: Either a mark type string shorthand or a full mark_def object.

mark_def.description: Full mark specification including type and styling properties.

stroke_dash.description: Dash pattern as an array of on/off pixel lengths.

size.description: Default mark size in pixels^2 for point-like marks.

align.description: Horizontal text alignment for text marks.

baseline.description: Vertical text baseline for text marks.

font_size.description: Font size in pixels for text marks.

tooltip.description: Tooltip behaviour: true to enable defaults, object/string for custom content.

pad_angle.description: Padding angle in radians between arcs.

path.description: SVG path string for path marks.

link_shape.description: Edge shape for tree / dendrogram marks.

node_shape.description: Node glyph for tree / network marks.

node_size.description: Base node radius / side length for tree / network marks.

iterations.description: Force-directed iteration count for network marks (cap 2000).

link_distance.description: Preferred edge length for network force layout.

charge.description: Repulsion strength (negative) for network force layout.

seed.description: Deterministic seed for the network force layout.

target.description: Bullet reference value to beat — a literal number or a data-field name.

bands.description: Bullet qualitative range bounds, ordered ascending (e.g. poor / ok / good thresholds).

comparative.description: Bullet secondary measure value (e.g. prior period) — a literal number or a data-field name.

point_last.description: Spark adornment: draw an emphasis dot on the final value.

point_extent.description: Spark adornment: draw highlight dots on the minimum and maximum values.

from.description: Lower bound of the shaded normal-range band in value-axis data space.

to.description: Upper bound of the shaded normal-range band in value-axis data space.

reference_band.description: Spark adornment: shade a horizontal normal-range band behind the spark, spanning the full plot width between from and to.
